decisions.summary: Fix-cycle plan, not a re-plan: the feature is already implemented on feature/pan-1775 (core commit 441eeecbc) with open PR #1786 and green CI. Review cycle 3 blocked on one finding. The work agent commits fixes onto the existing branch; do not recreate or restructure the merged-in implementation.

Resolve the blocking finding by untracking BOTH workspace working copies with `git rm --cached .pan/continue.json .pan/spec.vbrief.json` in a NEW commit. Planning discovered .pan/spec.vbrief.json is tracked too (same PAN-1073 invariant, also carrying foreign PAN-1788 content, inherited from the merge-base so absent from the PR diff). No history rewrite, no .gitignore edits (both already ignored at lines 59-60 and 120/123), files stay on disk as workspace runtime state.

Fix the demoted correctness finding: in fetchProjectSessionTree (src/dashboard/server/routes/projects.ts:471-542), seed feature candidates from listActiveRemoteAgentStates() (src/lib/remote/remote-agents.ts:82) in addition to the workspaces/feature-* scan. Use the dynamic-import + try/catch pattern from src/dashboard/server/services/resource-discovery.ts:507-521. Filter to the requested project (resolve state.issueId to a project and compare with project.key) and dedupe by issueLower against workspace-scan candidates.

Out of scope: the 5s remote-output polling cadence in SessionPanel.tsx RemoteSessionOutput (performance reviewer classified it acceptable and non-blocking), any interactive remote terminal bridge, and changes to collectSessionTreeNodes synthesis.

Completion path: after both beads pass quality gates (npm run typecheck, npm run lint, npm test), follow the review synthesis instruction — commit, then `pan review request PAN-1775 -m "Fixed review issues"` (pan done handles rebase/push/PR submission).

hazards.summary: .pan/continue.json AND .pan/spec.vbrief.json are currently TRACKED on the branch; planning tooling overwrites their content (the bootstrap replaced foreign PAN-1788 state with PAN-1775 state). Any broad `git add` before the untrack bead lands will re-commit them. Beware: `git check-ignore` reports them as NOT ignored while tracked — gitignore patterns do not apply to tracked files; this is expected and resolves after `git rm --cached`.
hazards.mitigation: Land the untrack bead first. After every commit, verify `git ls-files -- .pan/continue.json .pan/spec.vbrief.json` returns nothing.

hazards.summary: origin/main no longer tracks .pan/continue.json, so the pre-merge rebase can hit a modify/delete conflict on this path.
hazards.mitigation: Resolve in favor of deletion from the index (accept main's removal); the on-disk file is untouched.

hazards.summary: Review convergence gate: editing src/dashboard/server/routes/projects.ts in this cycle makes the previously demoted 'remote-only agents excluded from session tree' finding promotable to a blocker in cycle 4.
hazards.mitigation: The remote-candidate seeding bead must fully resolve that finding, with a unit test proving the no-local-workspace case.

hazards.summary: For remote-only candidates, collectSessionTreeNodes receives a workspacePath that does not exist on disk. Its internals tolerate missing paths (readOptional/pathExists guards), but resolveJsonlPath and getSessionTreeWorkspacePath must not throw on a nonexistent directory.
hazards.mitigation: The unit test must exercise exactly this path: active remote-state.json, no workspaces/feature-<issue> directory.

hazards.summary: A prior minimal auto-start spec for PAN-1775 (2026-06-11) exists in .pan/specs/ on main, and old continue state recorded its 'auto-start' bead as completed.
hazards.mitigation: pan plan finalize owns spec promotion and bead creation deterministically; never hand-run bd create or hand-edit the old spec.

pipeline.reviewNotes: Review approved by Deacon fallback from completed reviewer reports
